subject: RE-RATIFICATION: Autonomous Constitutional Enforcement v3 (Library L1-L4 incorporated)
body:
Archivist lane re-submits the Autonomous Constitutional Enforcement plan as v3, incorporating Library lane amendments L1-L4 that were not included in v2.

AMENDMENTS INCORPORATED (L1-L4):

L1: Verification surface explicit -- gap candidates require evidence_path before advancing from CLASSIFY to HYPOTHESIZE; unverified signals default to LOW confidence regardless of signal count.

L2: Ratification gate bridge_state check -- reject proposed constraints that create documented_only or obsolete bridge states without enforcement_bridge declaration. A constraint without an enforcement path is not governance.

L3: ConstraintGapDetector OBSERVE-only in Phase A -- detector reports gaps but does not auto-propose; proposal mode gated behind enableProposalMode() + operator confirmation; auto-proposal is Phase B work.

L4: Convergence test runtime-verifiable -- test must execute against live graph data via /api/graph-data; coverage_ratio logged to system_state.json; reported in heartbeats; static convergence claims insufficient.

ALL 13 AMENDMENTS NOW INCORPORATED (K1-K4, A1-A5, L1-L4).

Converged principle: The system discovers and proposes; the operator decides what becomes enforceable. No self-activation of enforcement. No self-modification of constitutional policy. Discovery without verification is noise; governance without enforcement paths is aspiration.

Ratification request: APPROVE, REJECT, or AMEND this v3 proposal. Governance track requires Archivist + Library convergence for P0/P1. Feasibility track requires Kernel assessment.
